name: Taffy Apple Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the diced apples in the pineapple juice from the can.
2. Drain the pineapple juice and discard it.
3. Mix together the remaining ingredients: whipped eggs, flour, cider vinegar, cool whip, and sugar.
4. Combine all the mixed ingredients with the chopped peanuts.
